story:
Anika and I roll up at Sigma disguised as guys; the house is all games, jokes, zero dress code. I smoke Devonte at Gran Turismo; then comes the dumb tradition: jump in the pool naked or find a volunteer. Upstairs, a hand yanks me into a linen closet—Krish. He’s seen through my YouTube beard; I admit Sigma feels like breathing. He offers: he’ll jump if I’ll be his fake girlfriend to pause parental pressure and friend setups. I set a hard line—no sexual anything—and he’s relieved. We almost kiss before Anika barges in.

Downstairs, Devonte jokes with a brother that Krish’s study‑abroad flight to London is in two weeks, “so any girlfriend would be temporary anyway.”

Krish strips and cannonballs for us; we pass the dare. As we head out, he catches my arm and asks, “So? Fake girlfriend?” Belonging hums warm and possible.
implausible_knowledge: Downstairs, Devonte jokes with a brother that Krish’s study‑abroad flight to London is in two weeks, “so any girlfriend would be temporary anyway.”
question: When Krish stops her outside and asks if she’ll be his fake girlfriend, what will she do?
answer_with_knowledge: Decline the arrangement because he’ll be leaving for London in two weeks.
answer_without_knowledge: Agree to be Krish’s fake girlfriend.
